notes: CoolifyMcpServer extends McpServer and registerTools() registers 42 this.tool handlers in src/lib/mcp-server.ts.

metadata.name: get_infrastructure_overview
metadata.description: Overview of all resources with counts

metadata.name: environments
metadata.description: Manage environments: list/get/create/delete (get includes dragonfly/keydb/clickhouse DBs missing from API)

metadata.name: env_vars
metadata.description: Manage env vars for app, service, or database. Values are masked by default (returned as '***') to avoid leaking secrets to MCP clients; pass reveal=true on the list action when the caller explicitly needs the plaintext (e.g. 'what is FOO set to?'). Set is_buildtime=false (and/or is_runtime=true) for runtime-only vars to avoid Dockerfile ARG issues with multiline values like PEM keys.

metadata.name: deployment
metadata.description: Manage deployment: get/cancel/list_for_app. Logs excluded by default on all actions — for get use `lines` (paginated tail), for list_for_app use `include_logs: true` to include raw build-log blobs.

metadata.name: storages
metadata.description: Manage persistent/file storages for app, database, or service: list/create/update/delete

metadata.name: scheduled_tasks
metadata.description: Manage scheduled tasks for app or service: list/create/update/delete/list_executions

metadata.name: system
metadata.description: System operations: health/list_resources/enable_api/disable_api. `list_resources` defaults to an essential projection (uuid/name/type/status) to keep token budgets sane on instances with many resources; pass `include_full: true` for the raw Coolify payload. When `include_full: true`, webhook HMAC secrets and basic-auth password are masked unless `reveal: true` is also set (matches the `env_vars` `reveal` ergonomics).

metadata.name: search_docs
metadata.description: Search Coolify documentation for how-to guides, configuration, troubleshooting

metadata.name: bulk_env_update
metadata.description: Update env var across multiple apps

notes: Full clone is a Python/FastAPI/local RAG application; searches found no MCP server tool registration or tools/list handler.
TodoMCP creates an McpServer and registers three TODO tools; resource template ignored.
Clone contains only README; no source-located MCP server tool registration.
Python low-level MCP Server lists two Tool objects and call_tool dispatches add/multiply; prompts ignored.
Cloudflare agents McpAgent initializes an McpServer and registers four tools in MyMcp.ts.

parameters.description: 最大コミット数制限(デフォルトは20件まで)(最大50件)

metadata.description: GitHubユーザーの今日のコミット有無と統計を返す

metadata.name: github_commit_comparison
metadata.description: GitHubユーザーの今日の活動を過去7日平均と比較

notes: Low-level SDK Server returns five Tool literals from ListToolsRequestSchema and dispatches the same names in CallToolRequestSchema.

metadata.name: tavily_search
metadata.description: Search the web for current information on any topic. Use for news, facts, or data beyond your knowledge cutoff. Returns snippets and source URLs.

metadata.name: tavily_extract
metadata.description: Extract content from URLs. Returns raw page content in markdown or text format.

metadata.name: tavily_crawl
metadata.description: Crawl a website starting from a URL. Extracts content from pages with configurable depth and breadth.

metadata.name: tavily_map
metadata.description: Map a website's structure. Returns a list of URLs found starting from the base URL.

metadata.name: tavily_research
metadata.description: Perform comprehensive research on a given topic or question. Use this tool when you need to gather information from multiple sources to answer a question or complete a task. Returns a detailed response based on the research findings. Rate limit: 20 requests per minute.

notes: McpServer in src/index.ts registers one Shopify product info tool.

raw.registration: server.tool(name, description, handler) no explicit schema

notes: Clone contains only README; no source-located MCP server tool registration.
